nasb.text: To Him who smote the Egyptians in their firstborn, For His lovingkindness is everlasting,

esv.text: to him who struck down the firstborn of Egypt, for his steadfast love endures forever;

cnv.text: 要稱謝那擊殺埃及所有頭生的， 因為他的慈愛永遠長存。

ccb.text: 要称谢那位击杀埃及人长子的， 因为祂的慈爱永远长存。

csbs.text: 当称谢那击杀埃及头生的， 因他的慈爱永远长存！
